assets.name: Application Container (Docker)
assets.description: Docker container running the Node.js application as root user. Compromise gives root-level container access.

assets.name: npm Dependencies
assets.description: Third-party packages: express@4.19.2, lodash@4.17.10 (CVE-2019-10744), sequelize@6.37.1. No lockfile means versions may drift. Lodash has known prototype pollution CVEs.

assets.name: Application Data (Database)
assets.description: Application data managed via Sequelize ORM. Classification assumed Confidential as typical web application data store.

assets.name: Container Image
assets.description: node:20-alpine base image (mutable tag, no digest pinning). Supply chain integrity depends on Docker Hub trust.
